review_request_topics.low_burden_freeform_prompt_shape: Briefly describe whether the subtitle design and visual feel are acceptable enough to continue toward production use, including any reservations.
evidence_available: ED-10ap stage-4 freeform user decision-card source
ED-10al diagnostic rehearsal metadata and style-token survival readback
Prior forward-progress observation that does not reopen display/layout polish
what_remains_unapproved: Final representative production-sequence typography review, if later required
future_freeform_answer_internal_normaliz: map clear visual acceptance or reservation language to this topic id
carry explicit reservations into pending notes
leave production subtitle design acceptance pending when the answer is partial or unclear
review_request_topics.stop_boundary_before_approval: Do not treat diagnostic survival readback or forward-progress preference as production subtitle design approval.

review_request_topics.low_burden_freeform_prompt_shape: Briefly describe whether the available render evidence is enough to continue toward production render readiness, and what proof is still needed.
evidence_available: ED-10al diagnostic rehearsal records ignored ASS/MP4/manifest outputs
Diagnostic metadata: 4.2s, 1920x1080, h264, aac, two streams
ED-10aq records no render/replay/media in stage 5
what_remains_unapproved: Final production render command, manifest, and review result
Portable artifact-store strategy, if later required
future_freeform_answer_internal_normaliz: map clear render-readiness signals to this topic id
carry missing proof into diagnostic gap notes
leave production render acceptance pending when the answer is partial or unclear
review_request_topics.stop_boundary_before_approval: Do not describe ignored diagnostic media or ffprobe metadata as production render acceptance.

review_request_topics.low_burden_freeform_prompt_shape: Briefly describe whether rights, publishing context, and public-use clearance are satisfied or still pending.
evidence_available: ED-10aq records rights and public-use gates as closed or pending
No upload, visibility, platform metadata, scheduling, or public-use action occurs in this route
Ignored proof outputs remain same-machine diagnostic evidence
what_remains_unapproved: Rights clearance or owner decision for source material and distribution context
future_freeform_answer_internal_normaliz: map clear rights or publication statements to this topic id
preserve missing rights or publication context as pending
leave public-use permission false when the answer is partial or unclear
review_request_topics.stop_boundary_before_approval: Do not infer rights, publishing, or public-use clearance from local diagnostic success.

next_executable_route.alternate_route_condition: Use only if a concrete diagnostic gap is found; ED-10ar does not identify such a gap.
next_executable_route.purpose: Normalize a later freeform answer while keeping unknowns unknown and approvals explicit.
